name: Sunshine Loaf Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the cake flour once, then measure and add baking powder and salt, sifting together three times.
2. Cream the butter thoroughly until smooth.
3. Gradually add sugar and cream together until light and fluffy.
4. Beat egg yolks very thoroughly with a rotary egg beater until light colored and thick enough to fall from the beater in heavy continuous stream.
5. Add the yolk mixture alternately with the milk, a small amount at a time, beating thoroughly after each addition.
6. When all flour is added, beat again.
7. Stir in lemon extract.
8. Pour into a greased 13x9x2 inch pan and bake in a moderate oven (350°F) for 45 minutes.
9. Spread Orange Butter Frosting on top and sides of the cake.
